description: UPDATE : FOUND 2/21 !!!!SUPERIOR FRIENDS!! Beth and I's dog Kaleo, jumped a fence during a play date around 615pm Thursday This was on Susquehanna in Billings Park. Last seen on Kilner drive/badger near the river. Please be on the lookout. Does not have his collar on but is microchipped. Has one blue eye and white markings on his shoulder blades. 55 pound 11 month old husky Contact me or Beth if found!
